name: Altro Park Aka Willow Park
description: Altro Park Aka Willow Park is a place to play pickleball in Lockport, NY. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The court is free.
